§7Guide Book #47§r
§lGrafting Table§r
§8BLOCK§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lFound naturally§r: NO
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lBlast Resistance§r: 45.0

•§lHardness§r: 2.0
•§lLuminous§r: 8
•§lFlammable§r: NO
•§lMining Tool§r: Pickaxe
•§lDrops on breaking§r: Grafting Table
•Can be activated using an §lHanging Roots§r for 5-6 minutes.
•The Grafting Table is a crafting table that
requires an activation material to function. It is specialized for expanding plant crafting and creating new types of plants.§’
